reforms.description: The U.S. government proposed a significant budgetary increase for the National Institute of Standards and Technology to support the Advanced Technology Program aimed at developing high-risk generic technologies. Additionally, the Administration intends to promote 'Regional Technology Alliances' and 'Agile Manufacturing Programs' to assist in the exploitation of network externalities and stimulate technology transfer, while also increasing federal efforts in education and skill-training for low-income groups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The proposed budget increase and initiatives are aimed at enhancing technology development and skill training, which are expected to improve productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms were proposed in the federal budget for fiscal 1994.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms involve significant budgetary increases and initiatives that represent a major shift in federal policy towards innovation and technology transfer.
reforms.source_quote: The Administration intends to promote 'Regional Technology Alliances' and 'Agile Manufacturing Programs' in order to assist in the exploitation of network externalities.

reforms.description: The U.S. government is shifting its focus from military R&D to civilian and dual-use technologies, aiming to improve the productivity of private R&D through federally-funded mission-oriented research.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This shift is expected to enhance the effectiveness of private R&D and stimulate innovation in civilian sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been announced as part of a strategic shift in R&D focus.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant policy change in the focus of federal R&D funding.
reforms.source_quote: Henceforth, federally-funded mission-oriented R&D will be used to try to improve the productivity of private R&D.

reforms.description: The temporary Research and Experimentation tax credit, initially established in 1981, has been extended multiple times and is proposed to be made permanent to enhance its effectiveness in stimulating R&D activities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Making the tax credit permanent is expected to provide more certainty and incentives for private sector R&D investment.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal to make the tax credit permanent has been announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the reform is an extension rather than a complete overhaul of the existing tax credit system.
reforms.source_quote: The Research and Experimentation Tax Credit would be extended through June 1995, at a five-year cost of $4.9 billion.

reforms.description: The Administration proposed a series of investment initiatives totaling $220 billion, aimed at various sectors including transportation, environmental protection, and technology, to stimulate economic growth. Additionally, a comprehensive overhaul of the health-care system was proposed, aiming for near-universal coverage through managed competition.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The proposed investments are intended to stimulate economic growth across multiple sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment initiatives have been proposed by the Administration.
reforms.importance_rationale: The scale of the proposed investment initiatives represents a major reform in economic policy.
reforms.source_quote: The Administration has been putting together a comprehensive overhaul of the health-care system.

reforms.description: The Administration has proposed the Defence Reinvestment and Conversion Initiative to ease the transition from military to civilian employment, which includes 29 different programmes aimed at personnel and local communities affected by military downsizing.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to support workforce transition and skill development, which are crucial for fostering a vibrant startup ecosystem.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been proposed by the Administration.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to address the challenges faced by communities affected by military downsizing.
reforms.source_quote: The Administration has proposed the Defence Reinvestment and Conversion Initiative to ease the transition.
